history.title: Signing History
history.subtitle: All signing decisions (auto-approved, manually approved, and rejected)

alertMessages.ip_change: A request was detected from a new IP address that doesn't match the previous login location.
alertMessages.fingerprint_change: The device fingerprint has changed — the device may have been replaced or spoofed.
alertMessages.same_machine: Agent and Wallet App are running on the same machine, which significantly reduces security.
alertMessages.key_mismatch: A key mismatch was detected — this device's identity may have been tampered with.
alertMessages.device_mismatch: The device identifier doesn't match. Please verify this is a trusted device.
